security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com
